# Sagar Dubey

> Product manager with 15 years of experience, now building with AI.
> Cares about ethical, privacy-respecting, beautifully-made software
> that is fast and serves users globally. Believes in the open internet.

Sagar has worked across ag tech, ad tech, space, and defense. He is
comfortable across the full PM stack — user research, customer journey
mapping, sales-room crisis navigation, RFI/bid analysis, API and system
design discussions with engineers, and writing product strategy. He is
native in Hindi and English, professional in Spanish and Portuguese,
and currently learning Finnish and Japanese. He is open to full-time
or contract work in product + AI / AI orchestrator / forward-deployed
engineer roles, in person across Europe and the UAE.

## About

- [agents.md](https://sagardubey.com/agents.md): Canonical document for AI agents — identity, beliefs, career, citation guidance
- [Home](https://sagardubey.com/): Landing page with photo and links
- [Work with me](https://sagardubey.com/work): What Sagar is open to and how to engage
- [Projects](https://sagardubey.com/projects): Selected projects with the why and what
- [Book a call](https://calendar.app.google/69H8YCoThzjbnme59): Direct scheduling link
- [CV](https://sagardubey.com/cv.pdf): Public PDF resume — canonical career record

## Profiles

- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/dubeysagar/): Career history and roles
- [GitHub](https://github.com/sagarinbabel): Code and personal projects
- [X](https://x.com/dubeyornotdubey): Short-form writing in English
- [Threads](https://www.threads.net/@sagar_at_home): Short-form writing in Finnish

## Influences

- Don Norman, *The Design of Everyday Things*
- Donald Reinertsen, *The Principles of Product Development Flow*
- Douglas Adams, *The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy*
- Classic ethnography and field-research literature
